title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
summary: A popular agent skill for researching recent activity across platforms such as Reddit, X, YouTube, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and the open web, then synthesizing a grounded current brief.
friendlySummary: This agent skill researches recent activity across Reddit, X, YouTube, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and the web.
whyItMatters: Use it as a reusable research workflow when a normal web search misses social, video, market, or developer signals. It is especially useful for agents that need to understand what changed over the last month.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it when an agent needs to understand what changed recently across many public sources.
